sections.sectionTitle: Judah leh Jerusalem tungah Topa' Thukhenna

verses.text: Topa, Vanglian Topa in Jerusalem khua leh Judah gam panin nuntakna leh luhin'na, nuntakna an khempeuh leh nuntakna tui khempeuh
mi vanglianpa leh galkappa, thukhenpa leh kamsangpa, aisanpa leh upapa
mi sawmnga a ukpa leh zalian a neipa, thu lamlakpa leh mitphial siampa, leh bum siamte a lakhia hi
Amaute' ulian dingin naupangte ka bawl ding a, naungekte in amaute uk ding uh hi
Mite khatlekhat, mi khempeuh in a lawmte ciat, mi khempeuh in a vengte ciat, hihgawp ding uh hi. Khangnote pen uhamte tungah, mi ginalote pen miliante tungah kiphasak ding uh hi
Mi khat in ama pa innsungah a sanggampa lenin, “Nang in puan na nei hi; nang, kote' makaipa nong hi ding a, hih a sialomtangte pen nangma khutsung hi ding hi,” a cih ciangin amah in
“Bangmah hihzo kei ning. Ka inn sungah an leh puan omlo hi. Mite a makai-in nong bawl kei ding hi,” ci-in a genkhia ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute khempeuh leh amau' gamtatnate in Topa langpangin amah dem uh ahih manin Jerusalem khua kipukin Judah gam kia hi

Amau' maiput in amau' langah teci pang hi. Sodom bangin amaute a langtangin gamta uh a, amaute in imlo uh hi. Amaute in gimna ngah ta hen! Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in amau' tung mahah siatna kitun' uh hi
Amaute tungah thu hoih ding hi, ci-in thuman mite kiangah hih thu gen un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in amau' gamtat hoih thaman ngah ding uh hi
Migilo in gimna ngah ta hen! Midang tungah a gitloh gamtatna tawh kizui-in ama tungah kithukkik ding ahih manin ama tungah thu sia ding hi
Keima mite ahih leh naupangte in bawlsia uh a, numeite in zong uk uh hi. Ka mite aw, na makaite un note lam hong lakkhial a, note' lampi zuih pen hong siasak hi
Topa in thupang dingin ama pan'mun hong la a, ama mite' thu a khen dingin a ding hi
Topa pen upate leh ama mite' uliante tawh thukhen dingin kipan a, “Leenggui lo a netumte, note na hi uh a, mizawngte' na a kisutte note' innsungah om hi
Ka mite sucipin mizawngte na gawina uh bang na cihnopna uh a hiam?” Vanglian Topa Pasian in ci hi.
Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Jerusalem numeite kiphasakin ngawng doksa-in lam pai uh a, kiphatsakna tawh a mit uh hei pampamin hi tuihtuihin lam pai uh a, a khe uh gingsak sualsual ahih ciangun
Topa in Jerusalem numeite' lutang meima sakin Topa in amau' lutang kolhsak ding hi
Tua ciangin Topa in khebuh hoihte, lutuam leh khade lim tawh a kibang kizepnate
bilbah tualte, taaute, leh mai sitnate
lukhute, banbulhte, kawngten'te, paknamtui bungte, leh a kivom aite
min gelhna zungbuhte leh nakbuhte
pawipuante, puanza neute, puanpite leh khutkhai ipte
puanza neu vang siseihte, saihadial puansungsilhte, dialkhipte, leh kikhuhna puante lakhia ding hi
Paknamtui tangin uihna, kawnggak tangin khauhualpi, limtaka kizem sam tangin lu kolhna, puan hoih tangin puanhampi, melhoihna tangin maizumna hun hong tung ding hi
Na mite, namsau tawh si ding uh a, a vanglian na mite, galsungah kisia ding uh hi
Khuapi kongpi tau-in thum ding hi. Khuapi, gamkhing suak ding a, a guaktanga om nupi leilakah a tucip tawh kibang ding hi.
